About

About Me

This page gives a clearer view of who I am and my motivations.I want to continue pursuing my career in technology.

Background

I am from Little Village located on the South Side of Chicago. Growing up in a strong Latino community continues to make me volunteer in community projects and events.

Interests

I am especially interested in cybersecurity and IT work. Challenging projects have always been enaging for me. On my free time I value projects that combine technical skill with real world impact.

Goals

As I continue developing professionally, I want to grow my technical abilities while creating solutions that support underserved communities. I also want this portfolio to reflect my long term ambitions.
